description_long: This chair features a minimalist, modern design with a tubular metal frame finished in a dark color, likely black or deep green. The seat and backrest are composed of evenly spaced horizontal metal rods, creating an open, airy appearance while providing structural support. The backrest is gently curved for ergonomic comfort, and the seat is circular, echoing the rounded frame. The chair stands on four slender legs, with two horizontal support bars connecting the front and back legs for added stability and a footrest. The overall construction suggests durability and weather resistance, making it suitable for urban outdoor settings such as parks, patios, or sidewalk cafes. The design is both functional and visually light, blending seamlessly into contemporary urban environments.
description: A modern, tubular metal chair with a circular slatted seat and curved rod backrest, finished in a dark color. Its open, airy design and sturdy frame make it ideal for outdoor urban use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the curved backrest and circular slatted seat, with the footrest and support bars visible.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the open slatted backrest and seat, with both front legs and the footrest clearly visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the backrest curve and seat structure from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the full width of the backrest and the symmetrical arrangement of the slats and legs.
